name: QA Widget Demo — Sales Dashboard
description: Created by scripts/create-scheduler.mjs — sends composed sales dashboard HTML to the Eko homepage

schedule._note: dtstart must be UTC in basic format YYYYMMDDTHHmmssZ; rrule is standard iCal

audience._note: Fill with Eko platform user IDs, or use --copy-audience-from <existingJobId> flag

webhook._note: publicBaseUrl = ngrok or any public URL pointing to the widget webhook server. Preset controls which HTML gets sent.
